about_quotes.speaker: Jason Palmer
about_quotes.evidence: when my latest record “The Crossover” came out back in December, we decided to try to throw some dates together to feature the players on that band, on that record, and so Mark Turner is on that record and Marcus Gilmore and Larry Grenadier.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Palmer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2025
